queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk mitigation effect of having no checking account on consumer credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the requested credit amount influences consumer credit risk and default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk reduction impact of maintaining a negative checking account balance on consumer credit default probability.
